summary: A queue of 180 brew batches for one brew house (capacity 1), spanning 6 beer style states over a horizon of 63,360 minutes (44 days around the clock). Every job could meet its due time if started the moment it is released, so lateness here is a sequencing choice, not a structural constraint. Rejection (the outside option) averages 7.9x the in-house cost.

reading.setup: CIP cleaning plus hop/yeast prep between styles; extra sanitation after sour batches to avoid cross-contamination, dry-hop prep before IPA
reading.note: numbers identical to the source CSV — synthetic, reproducible from committed seeds; not production records
